falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern and suggest a bullish trend rather than a HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Daily trading volume on the NASDAQ drops below 10% of its 20-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a sharp decline in volume would indicate extreme market participation collapse, contradicting the blowoff score and suggesting a potential topping pattern instead.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This policy shift would inject massive liquidity, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the bottom pattern through exogenous stimulus.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
